message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml

package "Controller" {
  class MainController
}

package "Model" {
  class User
  class MedList
  class Calendar
  class UserAppearenceInfo
  class Disease
  class Med
  class Day
  class Food
  class Reminder
  class Task
}

package "DataBase" {
  class DAO
  class DAOUser
  class DAODisease
}

DAOUser --|> DAO
DAODisease --|> DAO

MainController -- User : "manipulates and updates"
MainController -- DAO : "gets and updates information"

User "1" -- "1" MedList : "has"
User "1" -- "1" Calendar : "has"
User "1" -- "1" UserAppearenceInfo : "describes"
User "1" -- "*" Disease : "has"

MedList "1" *-- "*" Med : "contains"
Calendar "1" *-- "*" Day : "contains"

Day "1" o-- "*" Food : "contains"
Day "1" o-- "*" Reminder : "contains"
Day "1" o-- "*" Task : "contains"

@enduml
```
